news.t: FLCH ETF: Surging Chinese Stocks Could Drive More Upside Ahead
China-linked ETFs fall as Alibaba shares skid nearly 14%

holdings.infoBox: FLCH is an equity ETF with a total of 1036 individual holdings. The top holdings are Tencent Holdings stock at 12.18%, Alibaba Group Holding at 8.44%, China Construction Bank at 3.36%, Industrial and Commercial Bank of China at 2.49%, and PDD Holdings at 2.10%.

overview.description: The Franklin FTSE China ETF (FLCH) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the FTSE China RIC Capped index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of large- and mid-cap companies in China. FLCH was launched on Nov 2, 2017 and is issued by Franklin Templeton.

data.title: Tariffs on China is an idle threat, says CFR's Charles Kupchan
data.text: Charles Kupchan, Council on Foreign Relations senior fellow, joins 'The Exchange' to discuss the Iran war, tariffs and much more.

data.title: Trump threatens 50% tariffs on China: Here's what you need to know
data.text: CNBC's Eunice Yoon joins 'Money Movers' to discuss President Trump's threat to add high Chinese tariffs, the Iran war and the failed ceasefire deal.

data.title: FLCH ETF: Surging Chinese Stocks Could Drive More Upside Ahead
data.text: Chinese stocks are surging after China announced a new stimulus plan, and the China-focused Franklin FTSE China ETF ($FLCH) could have plenty of upside ahead. We were positive on FLCH…

data.title: ETF Edge: India and Japan see big international investing inflows while investors flee China
data.text: Dave Mann, global head of product and capital markets at Franklin Templeton, joins CNBC's Bob Pisani on 'Halftime Report' to discuss the opportunity investors should keep an eye on overseas.

data.title: China-linked ETFs fall as Alibaba shares skid nearly 14%
data.text: Shares of Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. were on track for their steepest daily decline on record Thursday, denting exchange-traded funds with big holdings of the Chinese e-commerce company.
